languages.text: "Нунциус изъятию не подлежит, а изъятие моей головы не поспособствует восстановлению твоих когнитивных функций, мирянин, даже если я пришью ее тебе. В некоторых случаях даже мои навыки бывают бессильны".

"Nuncius is not subject to removal, and the removal of my own head would do little to restore your cognitive functions, layperson, even if I were to graft it onto you. There are cases, it seems, where even my skills prove powerless."
languages.original_text: "Нунциус изъятию не подлежит, а изъятие моей головы не поспособствует восстановлению твоих когнитивных функций, мирянин, даже если я пришью ее тебе. В некоторых случаях даже мои навыки бывают бессильны".

traits.locale_text: "Nuntius is not subject to removal, and the removal of my own head would do little to restore your cognitive functions, layman, even were I to sew it onto you. There are cases, it seems, where even my skills prove powerless."

"Nuntius is not subject to removal, and the removal of my own head would do little to restore your cognitive functions, layman, even were I to sew it onto you. There are cases, it seems, where even my skills prove powerless."

"Nuncius is not subject to removal, and the removal of my own head would do little to restore your cognitive functions, layman, even if I were to graft it onto you. There are cases, it seems, where even my skills prove powerless."

"Nuncius is not subject to removal, and the removal of my own head would do little to restore your cognitive functions, layperson, even if I were to graft it onto you. There are cases, it seems, where even my skills prove powerless."

languages.text: "Nuncius wird nicht entfernt, und die Entfernung meines eigenen Kopfes würde Eure kognitiven Funktionen wohl kaum wiederherstellen, Laienperson, selbst wenn ich ihn auf Euch transplantierte. Offenbar gibt es Fälle, in denen sich selbst meine Fähigkeiten als nutzlos erweisen."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is not subject to removal, and the removal of my own head would do little to restore your cognitive functions, layperson, even if I were to graft it onto you. There are cases, it seems, where even my skills prove powerless."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius wird nicht entfernt, und die Entfernung meines eigenen Kopfes würde Eure kognitiven Funktionen wohl kaum wiederherstellen, Laienperson, selbst wenn ich ihn auf Euch transplantierte. Offenbar gibt es Fälle, in denen sich selbst meine Fähigkeiten als nutzlos erweisen."

languages.text: “努恩修斯不在可移除之列，而且就算把我的脑袋移植到你身上，也难以恢复你的认知能力，教外人士。看来，有些情况即便凭我的本事也无能为力。”
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is not subject to removal, and the removal of my own head would do little to restore your cognitive functions, layperson, even if I were to graft it onto you. There are cases, it seems, where even my skills prove powerless."

traits.locale_text: “努恩修斯不在可移除之列，而且就算把我的脑袋移植到你身上，也难以恢复你的认知能力，教外人士。看来，有些情况即便凭我的本事也无能为力。”

languages.text: « Nuncius ne peut pas être retiré, et l'ablation de ma propre tête n'aurait aucun effet bénéfique sur vos fonctions cognitives, même si je la greffais sur vous, profane. Visiblement, dans certains cas, même mes compétences ne sont pas suffisantes. »
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is not subject to removal, and the removal of my own head would do little to restore your cognitive functions, layperson, even if I were to graft it onto you. There are cases, it seems, where even my skills prove powerless."

traits.locale_text: « Nuncius ne peut pas être retiré, et l'ablation de ma propre tête n'aurait aucun effet bénéfique sur vos fonctions cognitives, même si je la greffais sur vous, profane. Visiblement, dans certains cas, même mes compétences ne sont pas suffisantes. »

languages.text: «Nuncius no se someterá a ninguna extirpación, y la extirpación de mi propia cabeza no contribuiría a restaurar sus funciones cognitivas, seglar, ni siquiera aunque se la injertase sobre los hombros. Al parecer existen casos que van más allá incluso de mis capacidades».
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is not subject to removal, and the removal of my own head would do little to restore your cognitive functions, layperson, even if I were to graft it onto you. There are cases, it seems, where even my skills prove powerless."

traits.locale_text: «Nuncius no se someterá a ninguna extirpación, y la extirpación de mi propia cabeza no contribuiría a restaurar sus funciones cognitivas, seglar, ni siquiera aunque se la injertase sobre los hombros. Al parecer existen casos que van más allá incluso de mis capacidades».

languages.text: "Nuncius çıkarılmaya tabi değildir ve kendi kafamı çıkarmam. Onu sana aşılasam bile bilişsel işlevlerini geri kazanmana pek yardımcı olmazdı avam. Görünüşe göre yeteneklerimin bile çaresiz kaldığı durumlar var."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is not subject to removal, and the removal of my own head would do little to restore your cognitive functions, layperson, even if I were to graft it onto you. There are cases, it seems, where even my skills prove powerless."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius çıkarılmaya tabi değildir ve kendi kafamı çıkarmam. Onu sana aşılasam bile bilişsel işlevlerini geri kazanmana pek yardımcı olmazdı avam. Görünüşe göre yeteneklerimin bile çaresiz kaldığı durumlar var."

languages.text: 「ヌンキウスは撤去の対象ではありませんし、仮に私自身の頭部をあなたに移植したところで、それを取り外したとて、あなたの認知機能の回復にはほとんど役立たぬでしょう、世俗の者よ。どうやら、私の技術をもってしても為す術のない場合というものが、あるようですね」
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is not subject to removal, and the removal of my own head would do little to restore your cognitive functions, layperson, even if I were to graft it onto you. There are cases, it seems, where even my skills prove powerless."

traits.locale_text: 「ヌンキウスは撤去の対象ではありませんし、仮に私自身の頭部をあなたに移植したところで、それを取り外したとて、あなたの認知機能の回復にはほとんど役立たぬでしょう、世俗の者よ。どうやら、私の技術をもってしても為す術のない場合というものが、あるようですね」
